title: Youmind 17505 Q
prompt: A stylish young woman taking a mirror selfie inside a modern clothing store, wearing casual chic outfit (grey cardigan, dark top, blue wide-leg jeans, black flats, crossbody bag), holding a tote bag. Around her are multiple cute chibi-style mini versions of herself with big eyes, glasses, and playful expressions (jumping, sitting, winking, drinking coffee). Soft warm lighting, minimal aesthetic store interior, doodle-style white sparkles and hearts, clean composition, high detail, pastel tones, kawaii illustration blended with realistic photography. A young woman taking a mirror selfie in a minimal modern home, wearing an all-black casual outfit with a crossbody bag and sunglasses on her head. Surrounding her are adorable chibi mini versions of herself in different playful poses (jumping, sitting, peace sign, drinking bubble tea), with big glossy eyes and soft cartoon style. Background includes a potted plant, wooden table, neutral decor, and framed art. Soft natural lighting, cozy aesthetic, white doodle sparkles and hearts, blend of realism and cute 3D cartoon style, high detail.
